name: root_agent
_comment_tools: end_session is a platform-provided SYSTEM tool. Do not create a tool
directory for it -- just reference it by name here. The other tools are
custom Python function tools defined in the tools/ directory.
_comment_child_agents: The cxas lint tool may expect spaces matching the 'displayName',
but the platform PUSH will fail (400 Reference Not Found) if it doesn't
exactly match the agent's 'name' field (the directory name).
ALWAYS use the exact 'name' field with underscores (e.g., 'troubleshoot_agent').
